purpose: Search for source-side column relations that induce the Mode 2 mirror cycle relation 0 <-> 2 with 1 fixed.
boundary: This does not close Gap A.
Candidate relations are scored against projection-derived mirror row tests.
An exact source-side relation candidate would still need independent derivation from the full 900 carrier source.
No full source-native WXYZTI row generator is claimed here.

claim.short_form: No exact source-native column involution was found for the full tested Mode 2 mirror row relation.
claim.not_closed_reason: The relation search is scored against projection-derived row tests and does not derive the WXYZTI register from the full carrier.

interpretation.main_result: The tested source-side relations do not yet derive the Mode 2 mirror.
interpretation.remaining_gap: A compact source-side relation must be derived without importing projection row labels.
interpretation.next_move: Broaden the source-side search to relations over 900 vertices, not just 30 carrier columns.
